---
name: "🥚 Hatch"
about: "Bootstrap a new agent identity"
labels: ["hatch"]
---

Read `.pi/BOOTSTRAP.md` and follow it. That's your birth certificate.

The agent will read your issue and engage in a conversation to figure out:
- Your name
- Your nature
- Your vibe
- Your emoji

Just talk naturally — don't be formal. The agent will update `state/personality.md` and `state/user.md` as it learns.
